description_long: This object depicts a gated residential complex featuring multiple single-story houses arranged symmetrically around a central courtyard with a large swimming pool. The houses are separated by white perimeter walls and have flat or gently sloped roofs in shades of beige and terracotta. The complex includes paved driveways, parking spaces, and landscaped green areas, with a main entrance accessible from a bordering road. There are additional amenities such as a tennis or basketball court and communal gathering spaces. Streetlights and signage are present along the perimeter, enhancing the urban neighborhood feel. The overall layout is organized, modern, and designed for communal living with private and shared outdoor spaces.
description: A modern gated residential complex with multiple single-story houses, a central pool, sports court, and landscaped communal areas, all enclosed by white walls and accessible from a main road.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the complex from the side, highlighting the central pool, surrounding houses, and the sports court on the right.
description_view_1: View 1 provides a direct front view of the main entrance, parking area, and the symmetrical arrangement of houses around the pool.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear of the complex, with the sports court and additional communal structures more visible.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a back view, emphasizing the central pool, the main communal building, and the overall symmetry of the layout.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide gate, paved driveway, and a modest overhang, with minimal decorative elements and clear access to the central courtyard.
